calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Roderick Sherrell, 415-317-7040 Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

Hearing is held. The Court states it did not receive financial documents. Mr. Sherrell argues and presents documents to the Court. The Court returns all documents to Mr. Sherrell. The court indicates the financial statement was blank. Mr. Sherrel present further documents from SSI and disability insurance to the court and bank accounts via cell phone. The Court poses questions to Mr. Sherrell re: expenses, income and assets.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1- ASSIGNEE COLLECT ACCESS LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

***After the hearing, order determining claim of exemption; The judgment debtor's claim of exemption is granted. (see scanned order for details).***

Amended HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
